notes: v354 — HIDE / SHOW YOUR PROFIT & LOSS IN THE PORTFOLIO. There's now a 👁 Hide P/L button at the top-right of the portfolio (in the numbers strip). Tap it and every profit/loss figure blurs out — the Open P/L up top, each holding's P/L, and the Unrealised / Realised / Total P/L on the Performance tab — while your Account, Cash, Holdings value and Invested stay visible. Tap 🙈 Show P/L to reveal them again. The app remembers your choice on this device, so if you like it hidden it stays hidden until you show it. Handy if you don't want the P&L staring at you (or if someone's looking over your shoulder). Hard-refresh (Ctrl+F5) to load v354. ALSO RECENT — v353 — Undo removed + brokerage fees verified ($10 buy / $10 sell). v352 — your shares only sell when you say so; trailing stop is opt-in. v351 — a stop you set overrides the rules (🔒). (Older notes live in the Owner's Manual changelog.)
